scripts.sync:skill: cp skills/add-sfx/SKILL.md apps/web/public/skill.md && cp scripts/install.sh apps/web/public/install.sh
scripts.r2:cors: pnpm --dir apps/web exec wrangler r2 bucket cors set woven-sfx --file ../../scripts/r2-cors.json
scripts.publish:mcp: pnpm build:catalog && cd packages/mcp && npm publish --access public
